descriptions: 150 had a rivalry with 67.
edges.evidence_quote: 150 would develop a rivalry with Brixton Hill-based group 67.

descriptions: A member of 67 killed a member of 150 in a gang dispute.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 February 2015, a member of the drill group and street gang, 150, Dwayne Simpson aka SQ, was stabbed to death by a member of 67 over a gang dispute.

descriptions: 150 is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some younger members of GAS Gang now referring to themselves as GAS Rockblock 150 (or Rockblock 150, and later simply 150).

Los Cachiros.description: Honduran criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking, founded in the early 1990s by cattle ranchers in Colón and Olancho departments. It became one of the largest transport groups in Honduras, accumulating a net worth of nearly one billion dollars. The group purchased cocaine from Colombian organizations and passed it to the Sinaloa Cartel and other Mexican groups. It had extensive business and political interests, including ties to the Honduran elite and government officials.

descriptions: Cachiros is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cachiros

descriptions: The Cartel del Norte del Valle was allied with the Cachiros.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cachiros

descriptions: Los Cachiros is listed as an ally of AGC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , CJNG , Brothers Keepers , 'Ndrangheta , Sicilian Mafia , Los Choneros , Los Contrabandistas , Los Cachiros , Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Cachiros is allied with Norte del Valle Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Rastrojos , Norte del Valle Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Los Cachiros are allied with Cartel del Norte del Valle.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Los Rastrojos , Cartel del Norte del Valle

descriptions: Cachiros is allied with Los Rastrojos.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Rastrojos , Norte del Valle Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Los Cachiros are allied with Los Rastrojos.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Los Rastrojos , Cartel del Norte del Valle

descriptions: Cachiros is allied with Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Rastrojos , Norte del Valle Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Los Cachiros are allied with Cartel de Sinaloa.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Los Rastrojos , Cartel del Norte del Valle

descriptions: Los Rastrojos are allied with Los Cachiros.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Cachiros

descriptions: Cachiros is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Cachiros

descriptions: Continuity IRA is listed as an ally of New IRA in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Continuity IRA

descriptions: The Continuity IRA formed from a split in the republican movement involving the Provisional IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The oldest dissident group is the Continuity IRA, which formed in 1986 following a split in the republican movement, over the decision to allow members, if elected, to take seats in Dáil Éireann.

descriptions: The Continuity IRA is a splinter group that split from the Provisional IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Several splinter groups have been formed as a result of splits within the IRA, including the Continuity IRA , which is still active in the dissident Irish republican campaign , and the Real IRA .

descriptions: The Real IRA and Continuity IRA have cooperated at a local level.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA is distinct from the Continuity IRA, another Provisional IRA splinter group founded in 1986, although the two groups have been known to co-operate at a local level.

descriptions: Shamsatoo group joined ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable among these are the Omar Ghazi Group, Shamali Khilafat, Gansu Hui Group, Harakat Khilafat Baluch, Jaysh ul Islam, Mullah Bakhtwar's group, the Shamsatoo group, and radical student groups in Pakistan and eastern Afghanistan.

D-Company.description: Organized crime syndicate founded and controlled by Dawood Ibrahim, based in India. Established in the 1970s by Shabir Ibrahim Kaskar and Dawood Ibrahim. Involved in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and terrorism, including the 1993 Bombay bombings and logistics for the 2008 Mumbai attacks. Designated as a Global Terrorist Organization by the U.S. Treasury.

descriptions: Chotta Rajan was a former key aide and lieutenant of Dawood Ibrahim, leader of D-Company.
edges.evidence_quote: He was a former key aide and lieutenant of Dawood Ibrahim.

descriptions: D-Company forged relationships with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: has 'forged relationships with Islamists, including Lashkar-e-Taiba and al-Qaeda.'

descriptions: D-Company forged relationships with Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: has 'forged relationships with Islamists, including Lashkar-e-Taiba and al-Qaeda.'

descriptions: D-Company clashed with and eliminated the Pathan gang leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: This ultimately led them to clash with the Pathan gang, the most influential gang in Mumbai at the time. By 1986, D-Company had eliminated most of the Pathan gang leadership, emerging as the dominant gang in Mumbai.

descriptions: Smuggling operations strengthened relations between Lashkar-e-Taiba and D-Company.
edges.evidence_quote: This smuggling has only strengthened the group's relation's with the Indian D-Company.

descriptions: Mexican Mafia member killed members of Mariana Marivilla.
edges.evidence_quote: The victims were members of the Mariana Marivilla gang.

Black Pistons Motorcycle Club.description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Neuwied, Germany in 2002. It serves as an official support club for the Outlaws Motorcycle Club, providing a recruitment source and conducting criminal activities on their behalf. The club has expanded throughout Europe, North America, and Asia, with over 70 chapters in the United States alone. Members are involved in drug trafficking, assault, extortion, and other crimes.

descriptions: Black Pistons and Hells Angels members clashed violently in Fredericton.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Black Pistons' Fredericton chapter were involved in a violent clash with Quebec Hells Angels bikers in the city, in October 2016.

descriptions: Black Pistons is a support club for the Outlaws, providing recruitment and conducting criminal activities on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Pistons Motorcycle Club is an international outlaw motorcycle club and official support club for the Outlaws Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Satan's Syndicate patched over to become a Black Pistons chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 5, 2002, the Satan's Syndicate biker club in Columbus, Ohio "patched over" to become the first Black Pistons chapter in the United States.

descriptions: Black Pistons are a support club for Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Hulko's funeral was held in Sault Ste. Marie on 18 August 2002 and conducted entirely by members of the Outlaws and their support club, the Black Pistons.

descriptions: The Outlaws are allied with the Black Pistons.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws are allied with the Bandidos, the Black Pistons

descriptions: Black Pistons MC is the official support club for Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: The official, and primary, support club for the Outlaws is the Black Pistons Motorcycle Club, which is active internationally.

descriptions: Zulu Warriors formed from amalgamation of Apex and other firms.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors were formed in 1982 out of an amalgamation of other Birmingham City firms including Apex.

descriptions: The Albanese are part of the Gullace-Raso-Albanese group targeted in Operation Alchemia.
edges.evidence_quote: Con la conclusione dell'operazione Alchemia della DDA di Reggio Calabria e dello SCO di Roma del 19 luglio 2016 vengono arrestate 40 persone tra la Calabria e la Liguria presunte affiliate dei Gullace-Raso-Albanese e Parrello-Gagliostro

descriptions: Avignone allied with Gullace-Raso-Albanese in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei ... Gullace-Raso-Albanese

descriptions: D'Agostino operate together with Raso-Gullace-Albanese in Canolo.
edges.evidence_quote: operano nel locale di Canolo insieme ai Raso-Gullace-Albanese

descriptions: The Gullace family is related to the Pronestì-Gullace-Raso-Albanese families.
edges.evidence_quote: a sua volta imparentata con le famiglie Pronestì-Gullace-Raso-Albanese

'Ndrina Serraino.description: The Serraino are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cardeto, Santo Stefano in Aspromonte, and Reggio Calabria, Italy. Originating in the 19th century as part of the 'picciotteria' criminal association, they have monopolized criminal activities in their home areas and expanded across Italy and internationally. Their illicit activities include drug and arms trafficking, with connections in Belgium, Canada, Bolivia, France, United States, Germany, Switzerland, Morocco, Libya, and Syria. They were considered the richest and most powerful family in Milan until the early 2000s.

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Serraino in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Serraino 'ndrina was a rival in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello , Imerti , Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: Serraino is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Serraino

descriptions: The Serraino clan allied with the Imerti during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Libri 'ndrina and Serraino 'ndrina are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Serraino 'ndrina

descriptions: Lo Giudice allied with Serraino during the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta i Lo Giudice si schierarono con gli Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Serraino and Alvaro were among the families that formed La Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: Le famiglie che permisero questo furono i De Stefano , i Piromalli , i Musolino, i Serraino, i Nirta , i Barbaro e gli Alvaro .

descriptions: The Serraino and Barbaro were among the families that formed La Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: Le famiglie che permisero questo furono i De Stefano , i Piromalli , i Musolino, i Serraino, i Nirta , i Barbaro e gli Alvaro .

descriptions: The Serraino sided with the Condello during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i Condello - Imerti - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Serraino were enemies of the De Stefano, plotting to kill their boss.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo periodo storico ci fu un'alleanza tra la famiglia Serraino e la famiglia Piromalli per progettare l'uccisione De Stefano.

descriptions: The Serraino and Di Giovine were involved together in drug trafficking operations in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: Serraino and Di Giovine were jointly involved in operations Belgio 1, 2, and 3 in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: The Serraino, Paviglianiti, and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: The Serraino sided with the Imerti during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i Condello - Imerti - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Serraino and Musolino were involved together in drug trafficking operations in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: Serraino and Musolino were jointly involved in operations Belgio 1, 2, and 3 in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: The Serraino, Paviglianiti, and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: The Serraino and Pesce jointly gave permission and became heads of the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: The Serraino and Piromalli allied to plan the murder of Giorgio De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo periodo storico ci fu un'alleanza tra la famiglia Serraino e la famiglia Piromalli per progettare l'uccisione De Stefano.

descriptions: The Serraino sided with the Rosmini during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i Condello - Imerti - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Serraino are one of the families that head the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: Basilischi obtained approval from the Serraino clan.
edges.evidence_quote: e dei Serraino di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: MC Ergoldsbach merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: HooNaRa was founded by the same person who ran CFC Security, indicating a close association.
edges.evidence_quote: HooNaRa was founded in the early 1990s by Thomas Haller, who also ran the security service CFC Security.

descriptions: The Leigh and Devine gangs fought each other in the Battle of Kellett Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Later that year, on 8 August, the "Battle of Kellett Street" was waged between rival gangs affiliated with Leigh and Devine, and occurred in Kellett Street, near King's Cross.

descriptions: The Qarajah family had a blood feud with the Jarushi family, resulting in deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: The Qarajah crime family, also originating from Ramla, used to have a long time blood feud with the Jarushis, resulting in the death of 24 people in the 1990.

Bala na Cara.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, founded in the early 2000s. Known for extreme violence, including executions with multiple shots to the face. Engages in drug trafficking, robberies, and murders. Allied with Comando Vermelho and active in southern Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

descriptions: Bala na Cara formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho for drug trafficking and other illicit activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nos últimos anos, a Bala na Cara estreitou laços com o Comando Vermelho (CV) , uma das maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil, estabelecendo um vínculo de aliança no tráfico de drogas e em outras atividades ilícitas.

descriptions: FMV is listed as a rival of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Os Manos , V7 , FMV

descriptions: Bala na Cara acts together with Os Aberto in several cities.
edges.evidence_quote: Atualmente, a facção mantém sua predominância em cidades como Serafina , Santo Ângelo , Cachoeirinha e Bento Gonçalves atuando junto a Os Aberto

descriptions: Primeiro Comando da Capital is listed as a rival of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Os Manos , V7 , FMV

descriptions: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense is listed as an ally of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Comando Vermelho , Primeiro Grupo Catarinense , Os Aberto

descriptions: Bala na Cara and V7 are in a violent conflict that started in 2016 after a kidnapping and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Com o crescimento da Bala na Cara , surgiu a facção V7 , que passou a tentar atrasar sua expansão. O conflito entre essas duas facções teve início em 2016, após o sequestro de Jeferson Lapuente , um integrante da BNC.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bala na Cara as an ally of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [pt] , Bala na Cara [pt]

descriptions: Infobox lists Bala na Cara as an ally of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Bala na Cara

descriptions: BNC is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: PCC lists Bala na Cara as a rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Militias , Okaida [ pt ] , Bala na Cara [ pt ] , Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [ pt ] , Sindicato do Crime [ pt ] , Clan Rotela

descriptions: BNC is listed as an ally of PGC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CV , BNC

descriptions: V7 was created to fight Bala na Cara, establishing a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Sua criação tinha como objetivo enfrentar a facção rival Bala na Cara (BNC) na região.

descriptions: V7 declared war on Bala na Cara in 2016, escalating the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 2016, os V7 declararam guerra à Bala na Cara (BNC), após o sequestro e execução de Jeferson Lapuente, um membro da Bala na Cara.

descriptions: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the White Patriot Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).

'Ndrina Bellocco.description: The Bellocco 'ndrina is a powerful organized crime clan from Rosarno, Calabria, part of the 'Ndrangheta. Active in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and control of businesses, it operates mainly in Italy and has international connections. The clan played a key role in founding the Sacra Corona Unita in 1981. Its influence extends to Lombardy and other regions, with ties to other 'ndrine such as Pesce and Piromalli.

descriptions: Bellocco, along with Mancuso, Pesce, and Piromalli, mediated peace for the Albanese in the Laureana di Borrello feud.
edges.evidence_quote: si risolve con una pace voluta dai Mancuso - Pesce - Piromalli e Bellocco

descriptions: The Bellocco are a 'ndrina within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Bellocco sono una 'ndrina di Rosarno , tra le più potenti di tutta la 'ndrangheta .

descriptions: Bellocco 'ndrina is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bellocco 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Ascone are a satellite cosca of the Bellocco.
edges.evidence_quote: la cosca satellite degli Ascone

descriptions: The Bellocco and Cimato are grouped together as a single cosca in the operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Eclissi... contro appartenenti alle cosche di 'ndrangheta "Bellocco-Cimato"

descriptions: The Crea 'ndrina helped Umberto Bellocco reassert leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: Umberto Bellocco viene scarcerato il 14 aprile 2014... avrebbe tentato di riaffermare la propria leadership, con l'aiuto dei Crea

descriptions: The Bellocco are allied with the Molè 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: sono anche alleati con i Molè

descriptions: Bellocco and Molè were both targeted in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: The Bellocco collaborate with the Pesce 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: collabora insieme alla 'ndrina dei Pesce

descriptions: Bellocco, Mancuso, and Pesce are all referenced as sources for drug supply through the port.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Antonino Belnome afferma che per quanto riguarda l'approvvigionamento della droga attraverso il porto di Gioia Tauro , bisognasse fare riferimento ai Mancuso , ai Pesce o ai Bellocco.

descriptions: Bellocco and Pesce jointly controlled port contracts and are allied.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Pesce clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts

descriptions: The Bellocco are allied with the Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: sono anche alleati con i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Bellocco and Piromalli were both targeted in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Bellocco collaborated with Piromalli-Molè on port contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Pesce clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts

descriptions: The Bellocco maintain close ties with the Varone 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Mantengono stretti legami con la 'ndrina dei Pesce , con i Varone

descriptions: The Bellocco are mentioned alongside Aquino-Coluccio and Piromalli in the Rent operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Bellocco helped set up SCU to counter Camorra, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: to counter the growing influence of the Camorra

descriptions: Bellocco supported the D'Alessandro clan in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Camorra D'Alessandro clan, who with the support of the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, were able to supply the entire region

descriptions: Capriati clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Mancuso 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , Camorra , Capriati clan , Parisi-Palermiti clan

descriptions: The Bellocco were in conflict with the Amato family, with a possible war prevented by arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: per prevenire una possibile guerra a Bologna con l'emergente famiglia di etnia rom degli Amato

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Mancuso 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , Camorra , Capriati clan , Parisi-Palermiti clan

descriptions: Umberto Bellocco authorized the founding of the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capobastone Umberto Bellocco conferì il grado di Santista a Giuseppe Rogoli , il quale, col suo permesso e quello di Carmine Alvaro fondò nel 1981 la Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: Umberto Bellocco ordered the founding of the Sacra Corona Unita by Giuseppe Rogoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Rogoli , (fondatore della Sacra Corona Unita per ordine di Umberto Bellocco, arrestato, sta scontando 3 ergastoli nel carcere di Viterbo ).

descriptions: Bellocco helped found the SCU, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: In the beginning of the 1980s Umberto Bellocco was involved in setting up the Sacra Corona Unita (SCU)

descriptions: D'Agostino committed a murder on commission from Bellocco.
edges.evidence_quote: al capobastone Giuseppe D'Agostino sono stati imputati ben 10 omicidi, compresa l'uccisione su commissione della cosca Bellocco

descriptions: D'Agostino are allies of Bellocco.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei De Stefano e dei Bellocco

descriptions: The Molè, Bellocco, Piromalli, Avignone, and Paviglianiti were targeted together in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco , Piromalli , Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti .

descriptions: A feud began between Bellocco and Pesce over control of the Rosarno local.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 24 novembre 2012 si viene a conoscenza di un principio di faida tra i Bellocco e i Pesce per il predominio sulla locale di Rosarno .

descriptions: Operation Sant'Anna targeted both Bellocco and Pesce, indicating ongoing conflict or cooperation? Actually, the operation targeted both, but the text does not specify the relationship; however, given the previous feud, it may be conflict. But the quote only states they were targeted together, not a relationship between them. So no edge from this quote alone. However, the earlier feud edge already exists.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 agosto 2014: operazione "Sant'Anna" contro i Bellocco e i Pesce.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco together form the local 'ndrangheta chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme alla cosca dei Bellocco costituiscono la " locale " di 'ndrangheta cittadino.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco together have international criminal connections.
edges.evidence_quote: All'estero, insieme ai Bellocco hanno collegamenti con la criminalità, austriaca , greca , libanese , tedesca e francese .

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco members were arrested together in 2006 for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2006 vengono arrestate 54 persone affiliate ai Pesce e ai Bellocco

descriptions: A member of both Pesce and Bellocco was involved in illegal betting operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione "Galassia" ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce- Bellocco Antonio Zungri

descriptions: Pesce, Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè, and Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì were targeted together in operation Crypto.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: operazione "Crypto" contro i Piromalli , i Molè , i Bellocco , i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco clans jointly controlled port contracts and activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Bellocco clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts for the construction of the container terminal in the port of Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco are often referred to together as a single entity, indicating close alliance or merger.
edges.evidence_quote: la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Piromalli and Bellocco were targeted together in operation Tallone d'Achille in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: 2002 - operazione Tallone d'Achille coordinata dalla DDA di Reggio Calabria contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Gallico

descriptions: Piromalli and Bellocco were allegedly connected in obtaining public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 ottobre 2016 si conclude l'operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Bellocco for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Bellocco 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: Cappello has ties with Bellocco 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Al di fuori della Sicilia invece i Cappello hanno stretto legami con ... Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: D'Alessandro worked with Bellocco 'ndrina for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: i D'Alessandro erano in attività con le 'ndrine Bellocco e Pesce del comune di Rosarno

descriptions: The D'Alessandro clan had contacts with the Bellocco 'ndrina for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: The D'Alessandro clan also used a network of brokers by which they accessed new supply channels, having contacts even with the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, historical 'Ndrangheta groups from Rosarno in Calabria.

descriptions: The Casalesi have excellent relations with the Pesce/Bellocco clan.
edges.evidence_quote: ottimi rapporti intercorrerebbero tra i Casalesi e la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Bellocco supported the Ferrentino-Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino group.
edges.evidence_quote: i Bellocco appoggiavano il secondo gruppo

descriptions: The Bellocco 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: Bellocco 'ndrina boss endorsed SCU activities and conferred a dowry on an SCU member.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminal activities of the criminal association would always have been endorsed by the 'Ndrangheta boss Umberto Bellocco who, after 21 years in prison, would have met the Sacra Corona Unita member Cataldo Caporosso and conferred on him the dowry of padrino.

descriptions: Giuseppe Rogoli was affiliated with the Bellocco clan and obtained permission to found the first Apulian 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: il mesagnese Giuseppe Rogoli, detto Pino, già affiliato al clan della 'ndrangheta Bellocco di Rosarno, chiesto e ottenuto il permesso al capobastone Umberto Bellocco, fondò la prima 'ndrina pugliese all'interno del carcere di Bari

descriptions: Banda della Magliana fought a war against the Proietti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: guerra al clan rivale dei Proietti

descriptions: The Farruku and Kërtalla crime groups had violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: Farruku’s criminal activity began in Albania with violent clashes between the Farruku and Kërtalla crime groups

descriptions: Los Salazares is a trafficking cell allied with Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the cartel's sub-groups and allies are known to consist of ... Los Salazares (trafficking cell in Sonora)

descriptions: Vostok Battalion is a Chechen militant unit loyal to Kadyrov, part of Kadyrovite forces in Ukraine.
edges.evidence_quote: Chechen militants loyal to Kadyrov have been active in the Russo-Ukrainian War since 2014. These forces include the Vostok Battalion and the Chechen Death Battalion.

'Ndrina Farao.description: The 'Ndrina Farao is a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cirò and Cirò Marina, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Marincola clan and operates in the provinces of Crotone and Cosenza, with branches across central and northern Italy and in Germany. Its main activities include extortion and drug trafficking, and it has ties with Albanian mafia. The clan rose to prominence in the 1970s and has been involved in contract rigging, illegal gambling, and arms trafficking.

descriptions: The Farao collaborated with the Mancuso in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Dall'operazione dei carabinieri Vortice 2 scaturisce che si rifornivano da Paesi Bassi , Germania , Albania e Milano in collaborazione anche con i Mancuso .

descriptions: Members of the Casalesi were arrested in connection with Farao operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono stati arrestati pure Antonio e Vincenzo Noviello dei casalesi .

descriptions: The Farao 'ndrina is allied with the Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Farao è una potentissima cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cirò e Cirò Marina , alleata con i Marincola.

descriptions: The Spagnolo family is listed as an allied family of the Farao.
edges.evidence_quote: Famiglie alleate - Marincola - Spagnolo - Giglio di Strongoli

descriptions: Rocco Moretti ordered the killing of Giosuè Rizzi because Rizzi was approaching the rival Sinesi-Francavilla clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo le rivelazioni di Domenico Milella, boss barese collaboratore di giustizia, Rizzi sarebbe stato ucciso su ordine di Rocco Moretti (detenuto) il quale non avrebbe gradito l’avvicinamento di Rizzi ai rivali del clan Sinesi-Francavilla.

descriptions: Tamazuj is listed as an ally of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Tamazuj

Clan Di Lauro.description: The Clan Di Lauro is a Camorra organization based in the northern neighborhoods of Naples, Italy, founded by Paolo Di Lauro in 1982. At its peak in the 1990s and early 2000s, it earned over €500,000 daily from drug sales, making Secondigliano the largest open-air drug market in Europe. The clan was involved in a violent internal feud in 2004, leading to the Scissionisti di Secondigliano split. Its power declined after the arrest of Paolo Di Lauro in 2005.

descriptions: Scissionisti fought a war against Di Lauro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: After the end of the war against the Di Lauro clan

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Di Lauro clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the Di Lauro clan, from Secondigliano, named after Paolo Di Lauro;

descriptions: The Abbinante brothers were top members of the Di Lauro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: erano ritenuti dagli investigatori elementi di vertice del clan di spacciatori capeggiato da Paolo Di Lauro

descriptions: Michele D'Alessandro was friend and ally of Paolo Di Lauro.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano rebelled and waged war against Clan Di Lauro.
edges.evidence_quote: alcuni fedelissimi di Paolo Di Lauro abbandonarono il boss, si ribellarono e gli fecero la guerra in qualità di Scissionisti di Secondigliano

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano split from the Di Lauro clan, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: il conflitto si scatenò quando vari gruppi scissionisti del clan Di Lauro decisero di staccarsi dalla casa madre

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan and Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud in 2004-2005.
edges.evidence_quote: the Di Lauro clan and the so-called Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud which came to be known ... as the Scampia feud

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan was at war with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano formed from former Di Lauro allies and fought a power struggle.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of Di Lauro's former allies formed a rival alliance (Scissionisti di Secondigliano) and started a bloody power struggle in 2004 known as the Scampia feud.

descriptions: Di Lauro clan fought a war against the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan war against the Scissionisti di Secondigliano inspired the current Italian television series Gomorrah.

descriptions: The two groups were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: la prima faida di Scampia che vede contrapposti il clan Di Lauro contro quello degli Scissionisti

descriptions: Scissionisti are a splinter group from the Di Lauro clan.

descriptions: Di Lauro clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.

descriptions: Abbinante clan boss was aligned with Di Lauro.
edges.evidence_quote: The Italian Direzione Distrettuale Antimafia first investigated the clan in 2002, which led to the imprisonment of its most influential members, including Abbinante clan boss Raffaele 'Papale e Marano' Abbinante, who was aligned with Di Lauro.
